before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the high-shot sampler row above the historical 2.0x beta gate and above the 1.5x profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the row below the beta gate and below the final-current profiler-note threshold after buffer reuse, frame reuse, and direct noisy Z-measurement output.

rows.dominant_cost: High-shot sampler throughput was dominated by repeated output-buffer allocation, per-shot frame allocation/reset work, and the simple noisy Z-measurement path.
rows.optimization_summary: Reused sampler output buffers and frame state, reserved 01 and b8 output capacity, and added a direct noisy Z-measurement byte-output path.
rows.follow_up: Broaden packed or bit-parallel sampler paths only after profiler evidence on larger Clifford plus Pauli-noise circuits shows the current path is the bottleneck.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured gate lookup far above both the beta gate and the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The threshold-completion report measured the canonical all-gate name-hash pair below the 1.25x timing threshold while alias, lowercase, and invalid lookup measurements remain Stab-only contract extras.

rows.dominant_cost: The faithful pinned Stim surface is all-gate name hashing, while full alias, lowercase, and invalid-name lookup behavior remains a Stab-only contract without matching Stim perf filters.
rows.optimization_summary: Matched the pinned Stim gate-name hash function for canonical-name benchmark parity, kept alias, lowercase, and invalid lookup contracts separate, and guarded the canonical hash pair with a schema-version-2 threshold.
rows.follow_up: Keep the canonical hash pair thresholded while clean evidence stays below 1.25x, and keep alias, lowercase, and invalid lookup contract measurements outside strict Stim-relative thresholds unless pinned Stim adds matching filters.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured sparse circuit parsing above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The final clean beta-125 primary beta report measured the row below the active 1.25x beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold after target-storage and simple-instruction parser fast paths.

rows.dominant_cost: Sparse .stim parsing was dominated by temporary target vectors, repeated integer scans, and generic dispatch for simple no-argument instructions.
rows.optimization_summary: Moved target storage to SmallVec-backed instruction buffers, parsed plain numeric targets in one checked pass, and added simple no-argument parser fast paths for common H, M, MZ, CX, and CNOT instructions.
rows.follow_up: Keep the row outside the 1.25x threshold file until fresh evidence proves whether remaining sparse-parser cost is dispatch, item allocation, or target parsing.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured sparse XOR above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The beta-125 focused M5 probe measured the table row-XOR and item-XOR pairs below the 1.25x gate after in-place row merging, small-row item shifting, and the 16-item stack-buffer symmetric-difference path.

rows.dominant_cost: Sparse table row-XOR previously allocated a new result vector for repeated row merges, and item-XOR paid generic Vec insertion and removal overhead on tiny sorted-unique rows.
rows.optimization_summary: Merged sparse XOR rows in place from the back, kept item toggling as a linear small-row scan like Stim, replaced generic insert/remove calls with bounded manual shifts, and added a 16-item stack-buffer symmetric-difference path before the 64-item path for tiny sorted rows.
rows.follow_up: Keep the row-XOR and item-XOR pairs thresholded while clean evidence remains below 1.25x, and profile the sorted-unique vector representation before adding new sparse-XOR workloads.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the 01 measurement-record reader above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The threshold-completion report measures the split 01, b8, r8, hits, and dets reader rows below the 1.25x gate with packed and sparse submeasurement thresholds; ptb64 remains an explicit contract-only row with checked beta and timing-regression waivers.

rows.dominant_cost: The old unsplit reader row mixed result formats and obscured whether each public reader format was comparable, while the 01 reader also paid generic text-record parsing overhead on dense bit lines.
rows.optimization_summary: Added packed and sparse streaming reader visitors, split reader evidence into 01, b8, r8, hits, dets, and ptb64 contract rows, and decoded packed b8 records word-at-a-time to match pinned Stim dense reader throughput.
rows.follow_up: Keep the paired reader submeasurements thresholded while clean evidence remains below 1.25x, and keep ptb64 as contract-only until pinned Stim exposes a ptb64 perf filter.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the old sampler-path probability utility proxy above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the direct probability utility comparison below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold.

rows.dominant_cost: The old benchmark compared pinned Stim probability utilities against a Stab sampler-path proxy instead of a matching probability-draw primitive.
rows.optimization_summary: Added the direct biased_randomize_bits utility and a seven-filter direct benchmark matching the pinned Stim probability_util filters.
rows.follow_up: Increase repeated work or per-filter threshold stability before adding this tiny utility row to the 1.25x threshold file.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the old CliffordString proxy above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the direct in-place CliffordString multiplication comparison below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold.

rows.dominant_cost: The benchmark previously measured a proxy path that rebuilt CliffordString products instead of the direct in-place multiplication shape used by the pinned Stim filter.
rows.optimization_summary: Added direct in-place CliffordString multiplication benchmark evidence matching the pinned 10K filter.
rows.follow_up: Keep the direct filter in the primary matrix and use threshold automation once repeated evidence remains stable.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the old PauliString proxy above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the direct in-place PauliString multiplication comparison below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold.

rows.dominant_cost: The benchmark previously measured a proxy path that rebuilt PauliString products instead of direct in-place multiplication at the pinned 10K, 100K, and 1M sizes.
rows.optimization_summary: Added in-place PauliString multiplication and direct benchmark filters for 10K, 100K, and 1M cases.
rows.follow_up: Keep the direct filter in the primary matrix and use threshold automation once repeated evidence remains stable.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured PauliStringIterator evidence above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the direct borrowed-result iterator comparison below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold.

rows.dominant_cost: PauliStringIterator evidence previously included avoidable owned-result churn instead of a borrowed-result stepping shape.
rows.optimization_summary: Added a borrowed-result PauliStringIterator stepping API and direct benchmark filters matching the pinned iterator cases.
rows.follow_up: Keep the direct iterator filter in the primary matrix and broaden iterator API only if later public compatibility needs it.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the primary rotated-surface sampler row above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the row below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold after the lazy packed small-frame sampler path.

rows.dominant_cost: Before the lazy packed small-frame sampler, rotated-surface sampling spent most time in Stab's scalar compiled-sampler frame path on the generated d3/r3 source-owned fixture.
rows.optimization_summary: Added exact-generator measurement detection, direct H/CX operations, leading Z-reset elision, small-probability channel fast paths, and a private <=64 qubit lazy packed byte-sampling path.
rows.follow_up: Future broadening needs profiler evidence from a machine that permits stack sampling because local perf was blocked by perf_event_paranoid=4.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured the primary unrotated-surface sampler row above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The after report measured the row below the beta gate and below the profiler-note threshold after the lazy packed small-frame sampler path.

rows.dominant_cost: Before the lazy packed small-frame sampler, unrotated-surface sampling spent most time in Stab's scalar compiled-sampler frame path on the generated d3/r3 source-owned fixture.
rows.optimization_summary: Added exact-generator measurement detection, direct H/CX operations, leading Z-reset elision, small-probability channel fast paths, and a private <=64 qubit lazy packed byte-sampling path.
rows.follow_up: Future broadening needs profiler evidence from a machine that permits stack sampling because local perf was blocked by perf_event_paranoid=4.

before_evidence.evidence_note: The before report measured error decomposition above the beta gate and above the profiler-note threshold before paired submeasurement evidence exposed the tiny-filter bottleneck.

after_evidence.evidence_note: The final clean beta-125 primary beta report measured every paired error-decomposition filter below the active 1.25x beta gate after inlining the tiny conversion helpers and avoiding redundant output validation for formulas with proven probability bounds.

rows.dominant_cost: The row median hid tiny independent/disjoint XYZ conversion filters where cross-crate call overhead and redundant Probability output validation dominated the closed-form arithmetic, while the longer Newton p10 and p100 filters were already close to the 1.25x gate.
rows.optimization_summary: Split the Stab-side direct-match measurements to match the pinned filters, added paired submeasurement ratio evidence, batched tiny direct-match timing, marked the tiny conversion helpers and probability accessors inline, and used a crate-private Probability constructor only for formulas whose output bounds are proven locally.
rows.follow_up: Keep all four direct pairs in beta evidence and promote additional schema-version-2 submeasurement thresholds only after repeated clean primary evidence shows the nanosecond exact and independent filters remain stable with enough headroom.
